'''zhashaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smackeroo|smackeroo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smackeroo|smackeroo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhashaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæshægæth|zhæshægæth]] || [[word:zhæshægæj|zhæshægæj]] || [[word:zhæshægæsh|zhæshægæsh]] || [[word:zhæshægæ|zhæshægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhashashagath|zhashashagath]] || [[word:zhashashagaj|zhashashagaj]] || [[word:zhashashagash|zhashashagash]] || [[word:zhashashaga|zhashashaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhashagath|zhashagath]] || [[word:zhashagaj|zhashagaj]] || [[word:zhashagash|zhashagash]] || [[word:zhashaga|zhashaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhashafgath|zhashafgath]] || [[word:zhashafgaj|zhashafgaj]] || [[word:zhashafgash|zhashafgash]] || [[word:zhashafgaf|zhashafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhashagatha|zhashagatha]] || [[word:zhashagaja|zhashagaja]] || [[word:zhashagasha|zhashagasha]] || [[word:zhashagaka|zhashagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhashagath|zhashagath]] || [[word:zhashagaj|zhashagaj]] || [[word:zhashagash|zhashagash]] || [[word:zhashaga|zhashaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhashagathal|zhashagathal]] || [[word:zhashagajal|zhashagajal]] || [[word:zhashagashal|zhashagashal]] || [[word:zhashagakal|zhashagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhashagathatha|zhashagathatha]] || [[word:zhashagajaja|zhashagajaja]] || [[word:zhashagashasha|zhashagashasha]] || [[word:zhashagaka|zhashagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhashagathan|zhashagathan]] || [[word:zhashagajan|zhashagajan]] || [[word:zhashagashan|zhashagashan]] || [[word:zhashagakan|zhashagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhashagathaoro|zhashagathaoro]] || [[word:zhashagajaoro|zhashagajaoro]] || [[word:zhashagashaoro|zhashagashaoro]] || [[word:zhashagakaoro|zhashagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
